description:
Create a SeisComP XML (SCML) file for the April 2024 Hualien, Taiwan earthquake and import it into the SeisComP database (mysql://sysop:sysop@localhost/seiscomp) using scdb and the dbmysql plugin. Save the SCML file to ~/Documents/hualien_earthquake.scml. The scmaster server and database are running.

Earthquake Parameters:
- Origin Time: 2024-04-02T23:58:11.000Z
- Latitude: 23.819
- Longitude: 121.562
- Depth: 34.8 km
- Magnitude Value
